metadata.title: Daniel Felipe Guevara | Portfolio
metadata.description: Software Engineering student at Universidad Cooperativa de Colombia.

about.subtitulo: Learn a little more about my profile and what I'm passionate about
about.bio1: I'm a Software Engineering student at Universidad Cooperativa de Colombia in Pasto. I'm learning web development with a focus on best practices and design patterns.
about.bio2: I'm passionate about teamwork with agile methodologies, using GitFlow for collaborative projects, and creating real solutions that impact people.

highlights.desarrolloWebDesc: Learning web development with Java, Spring Boot, React and Next.js
highlights.trabajoEquipoDesc: Agile methodologies, GitFlow and effective communication in collaborative projects
highlights.aprendizajeDesc: Always exploring new technologies and development best practices
highlights.resultadosDesc: Focused on creating real solutions that positively impact people
